name: Heidesand (Sandies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the butter until golden brown, then allow it to cool in the refrigerator.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and vanillin sugar (or vanilla aroma).
3. Gradually add the cooled butter to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
4. Shape the dough into rolls that are about 1 inch in diameter.
5. Place the rolls in the refrigerator to chill overnight.
6. Before baking, gently slice each roll so they are not too thin.
7. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190 degrees Celsius).
8. Bake the rolls for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
9. Carefully remove the rolls from the baking sheet once done.
